obs_1_no_closes_syntax.tester_note: PR body says 'closes part of #198' narratively, no `Closes #198` keyword. #198 is multi-PR template port (T-PR-1..13) — individual PRs intentionally don't fully close it. Manual closure after LAST T-PR merges (likely T13). cross-repo-close.yml won't fire on this PR.

obs_2_exit_code_drift.tester_note: shell-level `:?` exits 1 not 3. Doc-vs-code drift, not blocking. Lens d (fail-loud) satisfied.

obs_3_loc_consistent.tester_note: PR body LOC sum (1008) matches diff stat. Positive (unlike PR #60 internal contradiction).

pr61_owner_merge_gate.owner_merge_required_for: workflow file content review (.yml.tmpl is template-marked, downstream rename is consumer's call)
